flags.meaning: Freed many captives; grants ally support and morale benefits.
Rescued high-value prisoner; grants political mandate and elite escort potential.
Claimed nexus; personal power, higher magic volatility.
Destroyed nexus; denies enemy and city. Honest war.
Retuned nexus; enables cleaner city_warsight outcome later.
Destroyed war-sight engine; denies advantage permanently.
Freed oracle; possible future ally, moral high ground.
Bound oracle for city; strong advantage, moral cost.
City gains war-sight; improves ritual interrupts and strategy.
Enemy war-sight denied; enemy tactics degrade in later content.
You secured proof of internal sabotage.
The ledger was lost; traitor thread unresolved.
No decree; unrest risk, fewer official abuses.
Allies arrive if called in final approach.
Elite escort may arrive if called in final approach.
